description_long: This is a compact, tactical pump-action shotgun with a matte black finish and a short barrel, designed for close-quarters use. The receiver features a side saddle shell holder with five visible red shotgun shells, providing quick access to extra ammunition. The fore-end is ribbed for improved grip, and the stock is a minimalist pistol grip style, lacking a traditional shoulder stock for enhanced maneuverability. The barrel is relatively short, with a simple front sight and no visible ribbing or venting. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a standard trigger. The overall design emphasizes functionality and ease of handling in urban or confined environments.
description: A compact, matte black pump-action shotgun with a pistol grip and side saddle shell holder, designed for tactical use. Features a ribbed fore-end, short barrel, and five visible red shells.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the pistol grip, ribbed fore-end, and five red shells in the side saddle.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the alignment of the barrel, the shell holder on the side, and the compactness of the grip and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the shotgun's profile, pistol grip, ribbed fore-end, and the shell holder with visible shells.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the barrel, the pump mechanism, and the trigger guard area.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short length, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
